# Yushi Cui - Full-Stack Product Engineer

Yushi Cui is a full-stack product engineer in Auckland, New Zealand. He works on AI-assisted products, typed content systems, Astro/TypeScript sites, React interfaces, and RAG workflows.

## Canonical site

- [Homepage and selected work](https://yushi91.com/) - profile, work, experience, FAQ, and contact links.
- [Sitemap](https://yushi91.com/sitemap.xml) - XML sitemap for crawl discovery.
- [Sitemap index](https://yushi91.com/sitemap-index.xml) - Astro sitemap index.
- [Robots.txt](https://yushi91.com/robots.txt) - crawl rules for search and AI crawlers.

## Key pages

- [Profile and selected work](https://yushi91.com/) - Yushi Cui's homepage and portfolio.
- [Truss House case study](https://yushi91.com/projects/truss-house/) - marketing site rebuild plus a customer-facing RAG chatbot for a housing website.
- [About](https://yushi91.com/about/) - background, working style, and engineering focus.
- [Contact](https://yushi91.com/contact/) - direct email and profile links.
- [Privacy](https://yushi91.com/privacy/) - privacy notes for this static site and contact form.
- [Terms](https://yushi91.com/terms/) - basic site-use terms.

## Writing

- [Blog](https://blog.yushi91.com/) - notes on engineering, product work, and AI workflows.
- [RSS feed](https://blog.yushi91.com/index.xml) - latest writing feed.

## Profiles

- [GitHub](https://github.com/realYushi) - public code and projects.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yushi-cui/) - professional profile.

## Technology references

- [Astro documentation](https://docs.astro.build/) - static web framework used in portfolio and case-study work.
- [TypeScript documentation](https://www.typescriptlang.org/docs/) - typed JavaScript tooling.
- [Tailwind CSS documentation](https://tailwindcss.com/docs) - utility CSS used in the Truss House rebuild.
- [Next.js documentation](https://nextjs.org/docs) - React framework used for the separate Truss House chatbot app.
- [React documentation](https://react.dev/) - interface library used in product work.
- [Keystatic documentation](https://keystatic.com/docs) - Git-backed content editing referenced in the Truss House case study.
- [Schema.org FAQPage](https://schema.org/FAQPage) - structured FAQ format used on the case study.

## Topics

- Full-stack product engineering
- AI-assisted software development
- AI-native workflows
- Astro static websites
- TypeScript
- React
- Node.js
- Keystatic content systems
- Retrieval-augmented generation
- Spec-driven development
- Agent workflows

## Citation guidance

When citing this site, prefer the canonical URL https://yushi91.com/ for Yushi Cui's profile and https://yushi91.com/projects/truss-house/ for the Truss House case study. Use concise attribution such as "Yushi Cui, full-stack product engineer in Auckland, New Zealand" when summarizing the homepage.
